name: @loomle/sal
description: TypeScript SDK and normalized contract for Structured Agent Language.

scripts.generate: npm run generate:types && npm run generate:schema-data && node scripts/normalize-generated.mjs
scripts.check:generated: git ls-files --error-unmatch src/generated/sal-object-schema.ts src/generated/sal-object-schema-data.ts && npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated/sal-object-schema.ts src/generated/sal-object-schema-data.ts
scripts.test:schema: npm run build && node dist/tests/schema/embedded-schema.js && node dist/tests/schema/validate-fixtures.js
scripts.test: npm run check:generated && npm run test:schema && npm run test:diagnostics && npm run test:invalid && npm run test:roundtrip && npm run test:examples && npm run test:examples:extended && npm run test:examples:reference && npm run test:facade && npm run test:result && npm run test:memory && npm run test:memory:asset && npm run test:memory:blueprint && npm run test:memory:widget
